reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para comer un buen sandwich y disfrutar del parque después de un viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to eat a good sandwich and enjoy the park after a trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHNnNMSTlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atencion no te limpian el parabrisas y 20 minutos para atenderme con un solo auto cargando

(Translated by Google)
Bad service, they don't clean your windshield and it took them 20 minutes to serve me with only one car loading.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHa3JuaWV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Arboles, mesas y bancos una buena parada de descanso o un buen lugar para juntarse con amigos

(Translated by Google)
Trees, tables and benches make for a good rest stop or a great place to hang out with friends.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHcE0yYzd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelentes sandwiches un poco caros

(Translated by Google)
Excellent sandwiches, a bit pricey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NzRPQjZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
muy buena parada descansar un rato y seguir viaje. impecables los baños, y no te podes ir sin probar los fabulosos sandwiches  caseros y de muy generosa dimension. Riquisimos!!

(Translated by Google)
A great stop to rest for a while before continuing your journey. The restrooms are spotless, and you can't leave without trying the fabulous homemade sandwiches, which are very generously sized. Delicious!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2ajgtWEJ3EAE
